# STWB Whimsical

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d0ea78306f8fc311deaac2ec4ceaa423215c41a.png)

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/diWtO6g1/images/ae036067e279ff64dfcc5b1a036ed981188b8adb.png)![Survival Inventory texture from the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/diWtO6g1/images/e29c767e8dd6e4bfa09823445b1d8e9d713624d5.png)
</details>


A very loosely greek-themed, light blue GUI pack!

## Included Textures

Currently, this pack only includes textures for the following (more coming soon):

### Vanilla Support

- Survival Inventory
- Enchanting Table
- Crafting Table, Crafter
- Furnace
- Generic Chest Inventory
- Hotbar (Mostly, NOT Hardcore)

### Mod Support

- AppleSkin (Saturation bar texture)
- LifestealZ (Heart texture)
- ~~Origins-Reborn~~


## Usage

**Modpacks**: You may use this resource pack in any modpack distributed on Modrinth.

**Servers**: Contact us first!

## STWB

This stands for:

- S: Squid
- T: Turbo
- W: Wynn
- B: Bunny (Really really really awesome and a really really good artist :D )

Which, of course, are the makers of this pack.
